description_long: This tower is a tall, multi-story structure with a unique clover-shaped footprint, featuring eight stacked levels with dark, rounded corners and a central vertical axis. The exterior is predominantly dark, with each level separated by horizontal bands that appear to be made of glass or a reflective material, giving the tower a sleek, modern look. The windows wrap around each segment, creating a continuous band of blue-tinted glass on every floor. At the very top, a thin antenna extends upward, suggesting a possible communication or observation function. The structure lacks visible entrances or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian and futuristic design. The overall appearance is robust and monolithic, suitable for urban environments as a communication or observation tower.
description: A tall, clover-shaped modern tower with stacked blue-tinted glass bands and a central antenna, featuring a sleek, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the clover-shaped profile and stacked blue glass bands with the central antenna visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the same clover-shaped structure, with the glass bands and antenna clearly visible, similar to the front.
description_view_2: Rear view maintains the clover-shaped outline and stacked glass bands, with no visible entrances or additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other sides, showing the continuous glass bands and central antenna.
